MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

H. Nelson Meeks, Esq. appeared with plaintiff David Aughinbaugh, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by plaintiff James Sadler, as he is deceased.
No appearance by defendant myra Daniels, aka Lynette Daniels.
Default was entered against defendant on November 6, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on November 19, 2009.

The Court requires additional documentation from plaintiff in order to proceed with today's hearing. Good cause appearing, this matter is CONTINUED to May 27, 2010 @ 9:00 a.m. for further default prove-up hearing.
